case_title: MENDOZA, ANGEL vs. RACINE, EDWARD A. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, ANGEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RACINE, EDWARD A. L.B.
